metadata.description: A private, agent-driven personal health archive: file your medical records, log symptoms, generate doctor-ready reports, and run a genetic health analysis on your own DNA — all in a folder on your own computer.

plugins.name: health-archive
plugins.description: Organize your medical records, keep a living health summary, log symptom episodes, generate printable health reports, and analyze your raw 23andMe/AncestryDNA export — with your data staying in a local folder.
